title: Stir-Fried Seaweed with Korean Seasoning
description: A quick and easy stir-fry recipe featuring the unique flavor of seaweed and Korean seasoning.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the wakame seaweed and cook for 2-3 minutes, until rehydrated.
Add the Korean chili flakes, soy sauce, brown sugar, and rice vinegar. Stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the seaweed is well coated with the sauce.
Serve hot, garnished with additional chili flakes if desired.
